title: 8 Herbal Creams For Excessive Sweating
description: Rosmarinus officinalis creams contains compounds like camphor, bornyl acetate, and rosmarinic acid. These substances have antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce excessive sweating. The rosmarinic acid in these creams is a powerful antioxidant that can soothe skin irritation and prevent bacterial growth, which can contribute to excessive sweating.
